title: Yoga CONT
description: A Desert Faith motion note about fatigue at the hard point of a new intense yoga practice, with challenge and enjoyment held together.

motifMap.meaning: Fatigue is named plainly as the embodied cost of the practice.
The difficult threshold is located inside an ongoing discipline rather than a one-day mood.
The effort remains joyful and worthwhile despite exhaustion.

excerpt: Im pooped. Hardest week of any new intense thing is the end of the third week.

editHistory.notes: Nightly cached-source v2.6.5 batch run. Live Substack extraction was attempted first and failed because DNS could not resolve wanderersburn.substack.com, so this metadata used the matching cached local source packet. Classified as Desert Faith with Motion because the artifact centers fatigue, continued yoga practice, and the embodied challenge of discipline.

integrity.notes: Filename: 2026-06-05.yoga-cont.phase-desert-faith.variant-motion.metadata.v2.6.5.json. Variant assignment follows v2.6.5 phase-variant compatibility.
